summary: Recent updates to Firefox's image decoding capabilities have improved support for SVG (Scalable Vector Graphics) files by adding functionality that enables better parsing and rendering of link parameters within these images. This enhancement is important because it allows for more interactive and complex graphics on the web, ensuring that SVG images can effectively utilize links and attributes as intended. Although there are no visible changes for users right now, this update strengthens the browser's handling of SVGs, contributing to a more robust and versatile web experience.
